text:
C0200 BIMS: Number of Words Repeated After First Attempt - The data in this column identifies the number of words that the patient repeated after the first attempt. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the number of words that the patient repeated after the first attempt. 0 = None
1 = One
2 = Two
3 = Three
280 C0300A_RPT_YR_CD C0300A_RPT_YR_CD C0300A BIMS: Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct Year - The data in this column identifies how closely the patient knew the current year.
